description.value: Aura moderate evocation; CL 11th; Weight 4 lbs.; Price 47,315 gp DESCRIPTION When used outdoors in a temperate climate, this +3 scimitar grants its wielder the use of the Cleave feat and deals an extra 1d6 points of damage. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Magic Arms and Armor; Spells divine power or creator must be a 7th-level druid; Cost 23,815 gp
